helpful: fedcourts paths resolved the snapshot/event/outcome paths instantly
fedcourts validate data confirmed the artifacts before finishing
gaps: fedcourts query returned old reported opinions, not modern SCOTUS cert-petition priors, so it gave no calibration for IFP cert-denial base rates
no way to filter priors by petition posture (paid vs IFP docket) or by docket-number range
an aggregate base-rate lookup (e.g. SCOTUS cert grant rate by docket/Term) would beat re-deriving it from general knowledge each run
notes: Snapshot was a bare metadata stub (empty docket_entries, all dates null); the prediction rested on the IFP cert-denial base rate inferred from the structural docket number 93-7515 and party posture.
